zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton於1282年10月28日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維爾頓時，他的父親Baron John de Grey24歲，母親Maud de Verdun26歲。他和Anne Rockley至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1342年12月10日在他的家鄉享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: DeGREY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Angelle, Pierre, Theophile.
French: variant, with fused preposition de ‘from’, of Gruy, probably a habitational name from Gruey-lès-Surance in the Vosges and La Gruy in Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton was born on 28 October 1282, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Baron John de Grey, was 24 and his mother, Maud de Verdun, was 26. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Anne Rockley. He died on 10 December 1342, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales: Denbigh, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton est né le 28 octobre 1282, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Baron John de Grey, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Maud de Verdun, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Anne Rockley. Il est décédé le 10 décembre 1342, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton am 28. Oktober 1282 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron John de Grey 24 und seine Mutter Maud de Verdun 26. Er hatte mit Anne Rockley mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Dezember 1342 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton è nato il il 28 ottobre 1282 nel Wilton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Baron John de Grey, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Verdun, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Anne Rockley. Morì il 10 dicembre 1342, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wiltonが1282年10月28日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Baron John de Greyは24歳，母Maud de Verdunは26歳であった。彼はAnne Rockleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1342年12月10日に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton(이)가 1282년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron John de Grey(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Verdun(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Anne Rockley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 12월 10일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.28 Oct 1282–10 Dec 1342: 28 de outubro de 1282–10 de dezembro de 1342
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton nasceu em 28 de outubro de 1282, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Baron John de Grey, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Verdun, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Anne Rockley. Ele faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1342, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton родился 28 октября 1282 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Baron John de Grey было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Verdun, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Anne Rockley. Он умер 10 декабря 1342 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton nació el 28 de octubre de 1282, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Baron John de Grey, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Maud de Verdun, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Anne Rockley. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1342, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
